Exklusiv über Ferratec in der Schweiz: Exclusively available through Ferratec in Switzerland
The charging solution that grows with you.
hero_subtitle: Scalable charging infrastructure for underground garages, multi-party car parks and outdoor parking — centrally managed, wired, with minimal installation effort.
Wirtschaftlichkeit_text: Wired connection per charging point via the ConnectBar — no dependency on Wi-Fi reception in the underground garage. Wall or post mounting without foundation or civil engineering work, fast commissioning. Low total cost over the entire service life.
Zuverlässigkeit_text: Maximum stability, minimal effort. Thanks to self-healing architecture and central control, AMP5 noticeably reduces failures and support costs — ensuring your charging infrastructure runs even when no one is watching.
Skalierbar_text: Each SmartHub is a networked, digital distribution unit. Need more charging points? An additional SmartHub is added, automatically networked, load management and digital transparency scale with it.
Nachhaltigkeit_text: At least 75% recycled aluminium and a projected lifespan of over 20 years. Modular design allows targeted replacement of individual components.
Design_text: Robust aluminium housing in graphite black (IK10). 4.3-inch display and integrated LED lighting, flush-mounted in the ConnectBar.
Zukunftssicher_text: Ready for Plug & Charge and V2G. Firmware updates (FOTA) are performed without charging interruption — what you install today is still up to date tomorrow.
Schulung_text: Ferratec trains electrical installers in Switzerland on the planning, installation and commissioning of AMP5. As a certified partner, you benefit from attractive conditions, direct technical support and a growing project business.
System_text: Suitable for multi-party garages, outdoor car parks and underground garages — from small installations to large-scale projects.
SmartHubs lassen sich zu Gruppen vernetz: SmartHubs can be networked in groups
Wandmontage oder freistehend über Erdsch: Wall-mounted or freestanding via ground screws
Hersteller_text_1: Behind AMP5 is AmpSociety, an established Swedish manufacturer with direct roots in ChargeNode — Sweden's largest charging station operator with over 60,000 charging points.
Hersteller_text_2: AMP5 was born from the experience of a charging network operator. Ease of service, reliability, simple component replacement in the field.
Planner_text: Capture your project in a structured way, configure the number of charging points, mounting type, cable routing and load management — Ferratec then prepares a customised quote.
Interaktive Projektkonfiguration in weni: Interactive project configuration in just a few steps
Automatische Stückliste als Grundlage fü: Automatic bill of materials as the basis for the quote
Offerte wird von Ferratec individuell er: Quote is individually prepared by Ferratec
CTA_text: We advise property developers, building managers, installers and fleet operators — no obligation.
AMP5 ist eine Marke von AmpSociety: AMP5 is a brand of AmpSociety
